summary: General DHC-6 Series 300 reference material covering aircraft configuration, dimensions, stations, ground clearances, servicing references and major operating roles. This pack links the 2D dimension and station figures extracted into the app.

references.locator: Aircraft General chapter 5-12 and dimensions chapter 6

components.name: Aircraft configuration
components.description: Unpressurized all-metal high-wing twin turboprop with fixed tricycle gear, steerable nosewheel and PT6A-series engines driving reversible, full-feathering propellers.

components.name: Dimensions and ground clearances
components.description: Reference figures include wingspan, fuselage length, height, propeller clearance, track, tail span and related ground-clearance notes.

components.name: Aircraft stations
components.description: Station diagrams locate structural references from fuselage, wing, stabilizer/elevator and vertical stabilizer datums.
